_ADMIN_NOTE: Scoring formula weights. These control how workload points are calculated. Do not expose this file to end users.
_volume_note: Set to 0 until accurate volume data is available in the Excel. Enabling this requires reliable weekly record counts.
_base_note: Every assigned feed earns 1.0 point baseline before multipliers.

sheet_type_multipliers._comment: Multiplier applied based on the source sheet. LeadList court feeds are more complex; State_SME is territory reference only.

_ll_note: Lead List Responsibility column — court ownership is high-complexity work.
_dqs_note: DQS Responsible column — data quality responsibility.
_backup_note: Back-up DA column — secondary coverage, not primary workload.
_overload_note: Analyst is flagged OVERLOADED if their points are >25% above team average.
_underload_note: Analyst is flagged UNDERLOADED if their points are >25% below team average.
_max_note: Soft ceiling per analyst. Used for capacity calculations in assignment recommendations.
